content: Yogurt contains lactobacillus bulgaras, beneficial for lower digestive health and constipation.
Miso soup contains aspergillus oryzae, good for the upper GI track and can help with ulcers and acid reflux.
Sauerkraut contains lactobacillus plantarum, beneficial for the immune system and naturally abundant good bacteria.
Kimchi contains lactobacillus plantarum and naturally occurring lactic acid bacteria in cabbage, beneficial for gut health and absorption of nutrients.
Dark chocolate has probiotic effects and prebiotic effects, increasing lactobacilli and decreasing inflammation and C-reactive protein levels.
